title: About me
text:
I am a PhD student in Political Science at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
My research interests are: authoritarian politics, institutions in autocracies, political parties, Russian politics.

title: Research
text:
Publications

“Incentives to Join Opposition Parties in Autocracies: The Case of the Communist Party of the Russian Federation.” Demokratizatsiya: The Journal of Post-Soviet Democratization
